channel.title: Tucson Daily Brief
channel.description: The Tucson news you'd otherwise miss — daily briefings on Tucson and Southern Arizona.

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 16, 2026
item.description: Flood Watch in effect until 5:00 AM MST Friday (July 17)

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 15, 2026
item.description: Pima County Board of Supervisors postpones treasurer appointment

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 14, 2026
item.description: Pima County steps in to fund jail GED program after sheriff canceled contract

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 13, 2026
item.description: Sun Tran, Teamsters reach three-year contract deal, averting strike

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 12, 2026
item.description: Monsoon storm knocks out power for more than 10,000, floods streets and washes

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 11, 2026
item.description: Blowing Dust Advisory in effect from 4 PM to 11 PM MST today

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 10, 2026
item.description: Federal judge blocks Arizona polling-place clothing rule ahead of July 21 primary

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 9, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect until 8 PM MST tonight

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 8, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect until 8 PM Thursday, July 9

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 7, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect from 10 AM today through 8 PM Wednesday

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 6, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect from 10 AM Tuesday through 8 PM Wednesday

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 5, 2026
item.description: ⚠️ Extreme Heat Watch in effect from Tuesday morning through Wednesday evening (July 8, 8 PM MST)

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 4, 2026
item.description: Three arrested after security guard assaulted at midtown gas station

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 3, 2026
item.description: Pima County Treasurer resigned amid sexual harassment allegations

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 2, 2026
item.description: Midtown apartment fire kills one person and dog

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — July 1, 2026
item.description: Officer-involved shooting follows armed carjacking

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 30, 2026
item.description: Woman killed in shooting at Tucson apartment complex; man charged with second-degree murder

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 29, 2026
item.description: Human remains found in Picture Rocks; investigation underway

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 28, 2026
item.description: Motorcyclist killed running red light at Broadway and Campbell

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 27, 2026
item.description: Man fatally shot on Tucson's southside near South Sixth Avenue and I-10

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 26, 2026
item.description: Red Flag Warning in effect across southeast Arizona from Saturday morning through Sunday evening

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 25, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect until 8 PM MST tonight

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 24, 2026
item.description: EXTREME HEAT WARNING

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 23, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Warning in effect from 11 AM today through 8 PM MST Wednesday

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 22, 2026
item.description: Extreme Heat Watch in effect from late Tuesday morning through Wednesday evening

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 21, 2026
item.description: Gov. Hobbs vetoes 88 bills in end-of-session action, pushing her all-time record to 541

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 20, 2026
item.description: Gov. Hobbs vetoes 88 bills in final wave as Arizona's 2026 legislative session closes

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 19, 2026
item.description: Woman's body found in Santa Cruz River, day after storm swept her away

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 18, 2026
item.description: Distemper Outbreak Forces Pima Animal Care Center to Halt Adoptions

item.title: Tucson Daily Brief — June 17, 2026
item.description: Mental health worker charged with manslaughter in Sonora Behavioral Health patient's death
